description: Ku-ACT, abashayeli abafundi kanye nabashayeli besikhashana kumele bangabi ne-BAC engaphansi kwe-zero ngenkathi beshayela.
Uma kunemvula, yehlisa isivinini bese ukhuphula ibanga elilandelayo ngoba amabanga okuma ayakhula futhi ukubonakala kungancipha.
Kumelwe wehlise ijubane uye ku-40 km/h uma udlula izimoto eziphuthumayo ezimile ezikhanyisa izibani ezibomvu noma eziluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka.
Ungashayeli uma ukukhathala, ukugula, utshwala, izidakamizwa noma imithi kungalimaza ikhono lakho lokushayela ngokuphepha.
Ukuskena phambili nokuhlola izibuko njalo kusiza abashayeli ukuthi babone izingozi kusenesikhathi futhi basabele ngokuphephile.
Vumela isikhala esengeziwe eduze kwezimoto ezisindayo futhi ugweme ukuhlala ezindaweni ezingabonakali lapho nihlanganyela umgwaqo.
Izimoto nama-trailer akumele kudlule imikhawulo yokudonsa noma yomthwalo esemthethweni futhi imithwalo kumele iboshwe kahle.
Uphawu oluthi CHA U-TURN lusho ukuthi ukwenza i-U-turn kuleyo ndawo akuvunyelwe.
Akufanele upake eduze kakhulu nezindawo zokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, izibani zomgwaqo noma izindawo zokuwela abahamba ngezinyawo ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu zikuvumela.
Abashayeli kumele banikeze ithuba abahambi ngezinyawo lapho bewela futhi lapho bephenduka umgwaqo abahambi ngezinyawo bayawela.
Amaphoyisa angenza ukuhlolwa kokuphefumula okungahleliwe, futhi abashayeli kudingeka banikeze isampula yokuphefumula lapho beqondiswa.
Izindawo zesikole ku-ACT zivame ukusebenza ngesivinini esingu-40 km/h ngezikhathi eziboniswe ezimpawini zezindawo zesikole.
Esibonini sokuma noma emgqeni wokuma, kumelwe ume ngokuphelele bese unikezela ngaphambi kokuba uqhubeke.
Khulisa ibanga lakho elilandelayo ezimweni ezimanzi ukuze uvumele isikhathi esengeziwe kanye nebanga lokubhuleka.
Gwema ukulandela amaloli eduze kakhulu ngoba ukubonakala kanye nebanga lokuma liyancipha.
Lalela imikhawulo yesivinini yesikhashana, izimpawu kanye nabalawuli bethrafikhi uma ushayela ezindaweni zokulungisa umgwaqo.
Imizila yamabhasi ingasetshenziswa kuphela yizimoto ezivunyelwe ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu zibonisa okuhlukile.
Izindawo zokulayisha zigcinelwe izimoto ezigunyaziwe futhi ukusetshenziswa kabi kungaholela ezinhlawulweni noma ezijezisweni.
